title: The Marketing Mix: 4Ps
summary: Understand the four core elements of marketing strategy: Product, Price, Place, and Promotion.
content_html:
The Marketing Mix (4Ps) is a framework for developing a complete marketing strategy introduced by E. Jerome McCarthy in 1960.

1. Product

What you sell — physical goods, services, or digital products. Includes design, quality, branding, packaging, and features.

  • Core product: the fundamental benefit
  • Actual product: the tangible item
  • Augmented product: additional services (warranty, support)

2. Price

The amount customers pay. Pricing strategies:

  • Cost-plus pricing: cost + markup
  • Value-based pricing: what customers are willing to pay
  • Penetration pricing: low initial price to gain market share
  • Premium pricing: high price signals quality

3. Place (Distribution)

How and where customers can access your product:

  • Direct: manufacturer → consumer
  • Indirect: through retailers, wholesalers, distributors
  • Online / e-commerce channels

4. Promotion

How you communicate value to customers:

  • Advertising, PR, personal selling
  • Sales promotions, social media
  • Content marketing, SEO

exercises.title: 4Ps
exercises.prompt: The 4Ps of the marketing mix are:

exercises.title: Price strategy
exercises.prompt: A company that sets a low initial price to gain market share is using:

exercises.title: Place element
exercises.prompt: 'Place' in the marketing mix refers to:
options: Distribution channels and where customers can buy the product
exercises.answer: Distribution channels and where customers can buy the product

exercises.title: Augmented product
options: Additional services like warranty and after-sales support
The basic benefit of the product
exercises.answer: Additional services like warranty and after-sales support

exercises.title: Promotion tools
exercises.prompt: Which is NOT a promotion tool?

exercises.title: Value-based pricing
options: What customers are willing to pay (perceived value)
exercises.answer: What customers are willing to pay (perceived value)

exercises.title: 4Ps origin
exercises.prompt: The 4Ps marketing mix framework was introduced by:

exercises.title: Promotion vs advertising
exercises.prompt: Promotion is a broader term that includes advertising plus:
options: PR, personal selling, sales promotions, and social media
exercises.answer: PR, personal selling, sales promotions, and social media
